mapper.insert: INSERT INTO aqi_feedback (tel_id, province, city, af_address, af_aqi, af_date, af_time, af_img, af_content, af_state) VALUES (#{telId}, #{province}, #{city}, #{afAddress}, #{afAqi}, #{afDate}, #{afTime}, #{afImg}, #{afContent}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT af_id, tel_id, province, city, af_address, af_aqi, af_date, af_time, af_img, af_content, af_state, gm_id, assign_date, assign_time, admin_id FROM aqi_feedback WHERE tel_id = #{telId} ORDER BY af_date DESC, af_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM aqi_feedback
AND (province LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR city LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR af_address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT af_id, tel_id, province, city, af_address, af_aqi, af_date, af_time, af_img, af_content, af_state, gm_id, assign_date, assign_time, admin_id FROM aqi_feedback WHERE gm_id = #{gmId} ORDER BY af_date DESC, af_time DESC
